success:
The goblin scratches its bald head.
'You... you no squish me? Good good!'
'Shinies! You got shinies?' asks the goblin, eyes glinting like coins.

The goblin giggles with a shrill voice.
'You make belly-laugh happen!'

'Me ears open! Me ears listen good!'
chirps the goblin, hopping.
The goblin picks its crusty nose while nodding vigorously.

'Big-Boss not looking now.
We do talk-talk!'
whispers the goblin, glancing around.

The goblin's yellow eyes light up.
'Oooh! You say interesting things!'

'You smell like dead mushroom, but okay okay!'
says the goblin, sniffing the air.

'You bring food-food? Belly make noises!'
it whines, rubbing its stomach.

The goblin does a clumsy dance.
'New friend-not-squisher!'
'Me called Grukk! You called what?' asks the curious goblin.

The goblin offers you a half-eaten worm.
'You want? Still good!'

'You strong-strong! Me see muscles!'
the goblin touches your arm admiringly.

The goblin laughs, showing sharp teeth.
'You not like other big-ones!'

'Boss always say me stupid.
You think me stupid?' it asks timidly.

The goblin counts on its fingers.
'Me got three... no, four... how many fingers you see?'
'You know where find shinies?' the goblin leans in conspiratorially.

The goblin wipes its nose on its sleeve.
'Me listen more!'

'Other goblins say you bad.
Me not believe!'
the goblin shakes its head.

The goblin offers you a shiny pebble.
'For you! Friends give gifts!'

'You speak funny tongue, but me understand!'
the goblin grins proudly.

The goblin claps its small hands.
'You come talk-talk again?'
'Me know secret! You want know secret?' it whispers excitedly.

The goblin sits cross-legged.
'You tell story?'

'Boss say we always attack.
But you be kind!'
the goblin looks confused but happy.
fail:
The goblin sticks out its black tongue.
'Bleeeeh! Me no talk with you!'

'No talk-talk! Only hit-hit!'
shrieks the goblin, waving a stick.
The goblin throws a smelly rock at you dismissively.

The goblin covers its pointed ears.
'La la la! Ears closed!'

'You smell worse than carrion! Go way way!'
sneers the goblin, showing teeth.
The goblin spits a green slimy ball in your direction.

'Me too busy! You break boxes!'
shouts the goblin.
The goblin hisses and spits like angry snake.

'You be like all other big-ones!
Me hate!'
the goblin makes a face.
The goblin throws sand in your eyes, cackling.

'Boss say never trust you!
Boss be right!'
it yells, running away.

The goblin stomps its foot.
'No no no! Me no want talk!'

'You bring trouble!
Trouble for me, trouble for tribe!'
the goblin points accusingly.

The goblin turns and shows you its rear.
'This for you!'

'Your words be stupid!
Me ears hurt!'
it complains.

The goblin whistles for backup.
'Others! Come here!'

'You think me be dumb?
Me NOT be dumb!'
it screams offended.

The goblin keeps throwing rocks while laughing.
'Go way! Go way!'

'Me no talk with stinky-enemy!'
the goblin plugs its nose.
The goblin makes warding gestures at you.
insult:
'You... you be son of rotten troll!'
cries the goblin in a high voice.

The goblin throws a tantrum, pounding fists on ground.
'RAAAAH! RAAAAH!'

'Nobody call me that! ME GET BIG-ANGRY!'
screams the goblin, spitting.

The goblin's face turns red like pepper!
'GRRRRR!'

'You pay!
Me tell Boss!
Boss squish you!'
it threatens, wagging a finger.
The goblin stomps its feet, creating a dust cloud.

'Me not be bad things!
YOU be bad things!'
it responds, crying.

The goblin grabs a stick.
'You say sorry NOW!'

'Boss! BOSS! He say mean things to me!'
it shrieks toward the den.

The goblin bites its own finger in rage.
'AAAAARGH!'

'Me remember you face!
Me find you later!'
it hisses threateningly.

The goblin trembles with anger.
'You... you be worse than elf!'

'You words cut like knife!
Me heart hurt!'
it sobs.
The goblin scoops up a handful of mud to throw.
'Me tell ALL goblins you be bad-bad!'
joinSuccess:
'Really-really? Me follow you? Me be good, swear on shinies!'
the goblin jumps with joy.
The goblin claps its hands rapidly! 'Yes yes yes! Me leave stupid tribe!'

'Me tired of old Boss anyway.
He always hit me!'
it admits, rubbing a bump.

The goblin grabs your hand eagerly.
'When go-go? Me ready!'

'You be bestest Boss ever!
Me bring friends too?' it asks hopefully.

The goblin does a somersault.
'Me know cook rats! Me be useful!'

'Me always say me destined for big things!'
it exclaims proudly.

The goblin quickly gathers its belongings in a rag.
'Me ready leave!'

'Old Boss always say me be useless.
You think me useful?' it asks with hopeful eyes.

The goblin hugs your legs.
'You no leave me behind, yes?'

'Me know secret paths!
Me be good guide!'
it proposes excitedly.

The goblin dances in a circle.
'New life! New life with new Boss!'

'Me swear loyalty on all shinies in world!'
it says solemnly.

The goblin spits on its hand and extends it.
'Is goblin deal! We be family now!'

'Other goblins be jealous me go with you!'
it cackles mischievously.
joinFail:
'Me... me too scared.
Boss got eyes everywhere!'
it trembles, looking around.

The goblin glances nervously toward the den.
'Maybe... maybe tomorrow? Me think about this.'

'You be strong-strong, but Boss be more strong!
He squish me if me betray!'
it admits with trembling voice.

The goblin shakes its head fast.
'No no no! Me not ready!'

'Me no can leave tribe yet!
Me got little brothers here!'
it says sadly.

The goblin chews its nails nervously.
'What if you be worse than current Boss?'

'Other goblins call me traitor!
Me no want be alone!'
it cries.

The goblin backs away.
'Boss always say: who leave tribe die bad!'

'Me want come, but... but legs no move!'
the goblin seems paralyzed with fear.

The goblin whispers scared.
'Boss cut ears off last goblin who run...'
'Maybe... maybe you come back when Boss sleep?' it suggests timidly.

The goblin cries.
'Me be coward, me know!
But fear too big!'
'You promise protect me from Boss?' it asks distrustfully.

The goblin looks at its feet.
'Me... me need time to think.'

'Other goblins laugh at me if me fail!
Me no can risk!'
it says, shaking its head.

success: The warrior listens to your words carefully.

acceptable.
I'll join you,' they decide.

I shall follow.'

they bicker.
